raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/2025, I ordered a product from XXXX in the amount of {$470.00}. The product was sent with XXXX tracking # : XXXX. The address it was being delivered to has a XXXX mile driveway which these companies always deliver to the front porch. In this case, the package was marked as delivered with a picture on the delivery statement showing a box in the back of a truck ( not at front of home ). I never received the package any where on the property. I filed a dispute with Citi with the above details, and they've claimed I'm responsible. I asked for the supporting information over the phone and they didn't send it to me. Citi claimed I am responsible for the purchase. I'm not sure how I'm responsible for a purchase that was never delivered.
